title: Implement multi-branch mode
definition_of_done: Issues and op log stored on separate issues/ branch. Worker ops read/write to that branch without affecting working branch. All existing single-branch tests pass. Config flag or auto-detection switches modes.
outcome: Multi-branch mode fully implemented: issues dir path resolution abstracted by config mode, orphan branch/worktree management, all op reads/writes routed through AppendAndCommit for branch isolation, materialize pipeline mode-aware, init supports --dual-branch flag, SingleBranchMode derived from config. AgentSkill for trls also shipped.
